# Daily Report — 2026-06-03

## Task Completed
Added `get_ci_outage` tool — retrieves a single `cmdb_ci_outage` record by its `sys_id`.
Implemented `GetCIOutageParams` (required `sys_id` field) and `get_ci_outage` function in
`cmdb_tools.py`; uses `_format_ci_outage` for consistent field normalisation; 404 and
empty-result guards; registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml`
(`system_administrator` and `full` packages); 12 new tests.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1376
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

Existing dependency vulnerabilities in pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel — none in project code.
